results.title: Uncertain — Possibly Moe Multi-Modal Capability Routing: Survey

results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (MoE multi-modal capability routing); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (Chinese-five-element-thermodynamics terms vs LLM terms).
